categories.title: What to Write in a Sympathy Card
categories.h1: What to Write in a Sympathy Card
categories.metaTitle: What to Write in a Sympathy Card: 40+ Kind Messages
categories.metaDescription: Not sure what to write in a sympathy card? Warm, original messages you can copy free, or turn into a printable card in seconds. No cliches, just words that land.
categories.intro: The hardest part of a sympathy card is the blank space inside it. You want to say something real, not a tired line about a better place. These original messages are here to help you find the right words. Copy any one of them free, adjust the name, or turn it into a printable card to send.

quotes.text: There are no words big enough for a loss like this, so I will simply say: I am here, and I am not going anywhere.
I keep thinking about the way they lit up a room. That light does not just switch off. It stays in everyone who loved them.
You do not have to be strong for me. However today finds you is exactly how you are allowed to be.
I wish I could take even a little of the weight off your shoulders. Since I cannot, let me carry the small things: the meals, the calls, the errands. Just ask.
Some people leave a mark so deep that the world feels different without them. Yours did. I am so sorry.
Grief is love with nowhere to go. Yours is enormous because your love was.
I will remember them with you, for as long as you need me to.
Please do not worry about replying to this. I only wanted you to know you are held in my thoughts today and every day this week.
Whatever you need, whenever you need it, at whatever hour: I mean it.
I am so deeply sorry. May the memories that hurt today become the ones that comfort you in time.

categories.blurb: Every message on this page has a Make this a card button. It opens our free card maker with the words already loaded, so you can choose a calm design, add a name, and download a card to send or print.

categories.title: Sympathy Card Messages
categories.metaTitle: 50+ Sympathy Card Messages: Kind, Original Words
categories.metaDescription: Original sympathy card messages for any relationship. Read them free, copy your favourite, or turn any message into a printable sympathy card in seconds.
categories.intro: A good sympathy message does not try to fix the grief. It simply lets someone know they are not alone in it. These original sympathy card messages were written to be sincere and easy to send, whether the loss is recent or an anniversary is bringing it back.

quotes.text: Holding you close in my heart while yours is breaking.
May you feel surrounded by love, even on the days it is hard to feel anything at all.
Their kindness touched more lives than they ever knew, mine among them.
Sending you strength for today and gentleness for all the quiet days after.
You are not alone in this. Lean on the people who love you, and let me be one of them.
What a gift it was to have known them. What a loss it is to say goodbye.
Thinking of you with more love than this small card can hold.
May happy memories bring you moments of peace between the waves.
I am keeping you in my thoughts and holding a little of your sorrow with you.
With heartfelt sympathy, and a promise to check in again soon.

categories.blurb: Pick a message, tap Make this a card, and our free maker opens with the words in place, ready for you to choose a design and print or send.

categories.title: Condolence Messages
categories.metaTitle: Condolence Messages: 50+ Sincere Examples to Send
categories.metaDescription: Sincere condolence messages for cards, texts and flowers. Original wording you can copy free, or make into a printable condolence card in seconds.
categories.intro: When someone you know is grieving, a short, honest condolence message often means more than a long speech. These originals work in a card, a text, or a note tucked into flowers. Choose one, make it yours, and send it.

quotes.text: My heart goes out to you and your family during this painful time.
Please accept my deepest condolences. They were truly one of a kind.
So sorry for your loss. May the love around you carry you through the hardest days.
Sending you comfort, and the reminder that you do not have to face this alone.
With sincere sympathy for the loss of someone so dearly loved.
May they rest peacefully, and may your memories of them bring you quiet comfort.
Words feel small right now, but my care for you is not. I am so sorry.
Thinking of you and wishing you moments of peace in the days ahead.
Please know that so many people are holding you in their hearts today.
My condolences to you and everyone who loved them. They will be deeply missed.

categories.blurb: Every condolence message here can become a card in one tap: choose a gentle design, add the family name, and download it free.

categories.title: Words of Condolence
categories.metaTitle: Words of Condolence: 40+ Comforting Things to Say
categories.metaDescription: Comforting words of condolence for a card, message or eulogy. Original, cliche-free wording to copy free or turn into a printable card.
categories.intro: Finding the right words of condolence is hard because there are no perfect ones. What helps is honesty and warmth. These originals give you a gentle place to start, whether you are writing a card, a message, or a few lines to read aloud.

quotes.text: Some goodbyes are too heavy to carry alone. Let the people who love you help you hold this one.
A life that touched so many does not truly end. It lives on in every person it changed.
May you find, in time, that remembering them brings a small smile before it brings the ache.
There is no timeline for grief. Take all the time your heart needs.
The love you shared cannot be undone by loss. It is yours to keep forever.
I hope you feel gently carried by the many people who care for you right now.
Even in the deepest sorrow, may you find small moments of peace to rest in.
They were loved, they knew it, and that love does not disappear.
May comfort find you quietly, in the memories, the photos, and the people who share them.
You are stronger than you feel today, and softer than you need to be. Both are okay.

categories.blurb: Turn any of these words of condolence into a card with our free maker: pick a calm background, add a name if you wish, and print or share it.

categories.title: Short Condolence Messages

categories.metaDescription: Short condolence messages for a card, text or flowers when few words are best. Copy free or make a printable card in seconds.
categories.intro: Sometimes the kindest condolence is the briefest one. A single honest line can say enough. These short messages are made for cards, texts, and flower notes where space and words are limited.

quotes.text: Thinking of you with love.
So sorry for your loss.
Here for you, always.
Holding you in my heart.
With deepest sympathy.
Sending you strength and love.
You are not alone.
Wishing you comfort and peace.
My heart is with you.
Gone from sight, never from the heart.

categories.title: Sorry for Your Loss Messages
categories.metaTitle: Sorry for Your Loss: 40+ Ways to Say It Sincerely
categories.metaDescription: Heartfelt ways to say sorry for your loss without sounding like a cliche. Original messages to copy free or turn into a printable card.
categories.intro: "Sorry for your loss" can feel like a placeholder. These messages keep the sincerity of that phrase while giving you something warmer and more personal to send.

quotes.text: I am so sorry for your loss. They mattered, and so does your grief.
Sorry does not feel like enough, but I mean it with my whole heart.
I am sorry you are hurting. I am here for whatever comes next.
So sorry you have to say goodbye to someone so loved.
I am sorry. Please let the people around you carry you for a while.
Sorry for your loss, and grateful for the person they were.
I am sorry. May the good memories be the loudest ones in time.
So deeply sorry. Take all the space you need to feel this.
I am sorry for your loss and thinking of you more than you know.
Sorry is a small word for a big loss, but it comes with all my love.

categories.metaDescription: Heartfelt deepest sympathy messages for cards and flowers. Original, sincere wording to copy free or turn into a printable sympathy card.
categories.intro: When the loss is profound, your message should carry weight without becoming heavy. These deepest sympathy messages are written to feel sincere and gentle at once.

quotes.text: With our deepest sympathy, and our arms around you from afar.
Please accept our heartfelt condolences. Their memory will always be a blessing.
Our deepest sympathies to you and your family. May you find comfort in one another.
From the bottom of my heart, I am so sorry. They were extraordinary.
With the deepest sympathy for a loss that words cannot measure.
Our hearts are with you. May love surround you until the pain softens.
Sending our most heartfelt condolences and our steady, ongoing support.
With profound sympathy, and a promise that they will not be forgotten.
May you feel the depth of how many people are grieving alongside you.

categories.title: Condolence Messages for a Friend
categories.metaTitle: Condolence Messages for a Friend: 40+ Caring Lines
categories.metaDescription: Warm condolence messages for a grieving friend. Original wording to copy free or turn into a printable card to send.
categories.intro: A friend does not need perfect words, just your presence. These messages help you show up for someone you love with warmth and without cliche.

quotes.text: You have always been there for me. Now it is my turn. I am not going anywhere.
I cannot make this better, but I can sit with you in it for as long as you need.
You do not have to hold it together with me. I have got you either way.
I am one phone call away, at any hour, for anything at all.
I am so sorry, my friend. Let me handle the little things so you can breathe.
Your heart is one of the kindest I know. I hate that it is hurting like this.
I will keep checking in, even when you go quiet. Especially when you go quiet.
Whatever you need, no matter how small or strange, ask me first.
I am grieving with you and for you. You are so loved.
Take your time. I will be right here on the other side of it.

She gave you your first home, and she will always be part of the one you carry inside.

Her voice, her ways, her love: they live on in you now, and always will.
May the memory of your mum wrap around you like the comfort she always gave.
Sending you so much love as you grieve the woman who gave you everything.
A mother like yours is never truly gone while you carry her with you.

categories.title: Bereavement Messages
categories.metaTitle: Bereavement Messages: 40+ Comforting Words
categories.metaDescription: Comforting bereavement messages for cards, texts and notes. Original wording to copy free or turn into a printable card.
categories.intro: Bereavement does not end when the funeral does. These messages work for the first hard days and for the quiet weeks after, when a check-in matters most.

quotes.text: Grief comes in waves. On the days it pulls you under, remember how many hands are reaching for you.
There is no right way to do this. However you are grieving is okay.
The weeks after are often the loneliest. I am still here, still thinking of you.
Be gentle with yourself. You are carrying something enormous.
It is okay to laugh, to cry, to feel nothing, to feel everything. All of it is grief.
I will keep showing up, long after the flowers fade.
Some days survival is enough. Let it be enough.
You do not have to move on. You only have to move forward, slowly, in your own time.
I am checking in because you are on my mind and in my heart.
Whenever the grief feels too big, you do not have to hold it alone.

categories.blurb: Send a card that says you are still there: tap Make this a card, choose a soft design, and download it free.

May the happy memories of them bring you comfort in the quiet.

quotes.text: A love like yours does not end. It simply changes shape and stays with you.

May the years you shared be a comfort now, even through the ache of missing him.

May you feel him close in the small, ordinary moments you shared.
There are no words for a loss this deep. Only my love, and my steady presence.
Take all the time you need. Grief for a great love has no schedule.

quotes.text: There are no words for this. I am simply here, and I am not going anywhere.
Your child was so deeply loved, and knew nothing but that love.
They are yours forever. Nothing about that changes.
I will say their name with you, for as long as you want to hear it.
No parent should carry this weight. Let me carry the small things.
Their life mattered beyond measure, and so does every part of your grief.
May the love between you be a comfort, even through the deepest ache.
I am so deeply, deeply sorry. They will never be forgotten.
You do not have to hold this alone. I am here for as long as it takes.
The love you gave them is theirs forever, and always will be.

categories.blurb: The most tender words, for grieving parents.

quotes.text: Your baby was real, was loved, and mattered. I am so deeply sorry.
There are no words for this loss. Only my love and my presence.

Your baby is part of your family, now and always.
May you be held gently through a grief the world too often overlooks.
I am so sorry. Your baby was loved from the very first moment.
You do not have to be strong. However you grieve is right.
The love you already hold for them does not end. It is theirs forever.

categories.title: Sympathy Messages After a Long Illness
categories.h1: Sympathy Messages After a Long Illness

quotes.text: You loved and cared for them through so much. That devotion was a gift.
Their struggle is over, and your love never wavered through any of it.

Sending you strength as you grieve, and as you finally rest.

quotes.text: There was no warning and no goodbye, and that is its own kind of pain. I am so sorry.

quotes.text: May the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, guard your heart.
Praying for you, and trusting them into the loving hands of the Lord.
May God comfort you and hold you close in this time of grief.
Held in prayer, and in the hope that death is not the end.
May the Lord be your refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.
Resting in the promise that those who believe shall never truly die.

Praying that the God of all comfort draws near to you and your family.
May you feel His presence in every kindness shown to you now.
With prayers of comfort, and faith that you will meet again.

quotes.text: May their soul, and the souls of all the faithful departed, rest in peace.

Praying the Lord welcomes them home and gives you His peace.
Holding you and your family in prayer, and lighting a candle in their memory.
May the hope of the Resurrection be a comfort to you now.
With heartfelt prayers for them, and for your comfort and strength.

quotes.text: Grief is love with nowhere to go. Yours is vast because your love was.

categories.title: Rainbow Bridge Messages
categories.h1: Rainbow Bridge Messages for a Beloved Pet
categories.metaTitle: Rainbow Bridge Messages: 40+ Original Lines for a Pet
categories.metaDescription: Original Rainbow Bridge messages for a pet who has died. Gentle wording to copy free or turn into a keepsake card.
categories.intro: The rainbow bridge has become a gentle way to speak about a pet who has died. These messages are our own original wording in that comforting spirit, ready for a card, a post, or a keepsake.

quotes.text: Run free, sweet one. The pain is gone and only the love remains.
Until we meet again, you are chasing sunbeams somewhere warm.
No more aching bones, no more tired days. Just fields and light and rest.
You crossed over carried by every bit of love we had to give.
Wait for us. We will know your face among a thousand others.
Somewhere you are young again, running the way you used to.
Goodbye for now, not goodbye forever, my dear friend.
You left paw prints on a heart that will never quite be the same.
Rest gently. You were the best of company and the truest of friends.

categories.title: Pet Sympathy Card Messages

quotes.text: So sorry for the loss of your beloved companion. They were family.

Grief this big only comes from love this big.
They knew nothing but your kindness, right to the very end.
You gave them a wonderful life. Hold on to that.
There is no such thing as just a pet. I am so sorry.
May the happy memories of them find you in the quiet moments.
Sending love to you and everyone who is missing them.

quotes.text: They chose you, and that was never a small thing.

Thinking of you after the loss of your best friend.
There is no right way to grieve an animal you loved this much.
Take your time. This is a real loss and it deserves real grief.
I remember how happy they always were to see you.
You gave them a wonderful life, right to the end.
If you want to talk about them, I would love to hear the stories.
So sorry. The house will feel wrong for a while, and that is okay.
Sending love to you and to everyone who is missing them.

categories.blurb: For a blank pet sympathy card.

categories.title: Pet Memorial Messages
categories.metaTitle: Pet Memorial Messages: 40+ Lines for a Keepsake
categories.metaDescription: Pet memorial and remembrance messages for a keepsake, plaque or anniversary. Original wording to copy free or make into a card.
categories.intro: For a memorial, a keepsake, or the anniversary of the day they died. These original messages are made to be kept, printed, or framed alongside their photo.

quotes.text: Always loved, never forgotten, forever part of this family.
In loving memory of a very good friend.
Their paw prints stay on our hearts.
Remembering you today, and every day, with so much love.
You were here, you were loved, and you mattered.
Some friends walk on four legs and stay for a lifetime.
Still missed, still loved, still part of every story we tell.
Thank you for every ordinary, happy day.
Our home was better with you in it.
Sleeping now, but never far from us.

categories.title: Sorry for the Loss of Your Pet
categories.h1: Sorry for the Loss of Your Pet
categories.metaTitle: Sorry for the Loss of Your Pet: 40+ Ways to Say It
categories.metaDescription: Sincere ways to say sorry for the loss of a pet, without sounding dismissive. Original wording to copy free or make into a card.
categories.intro: "Sorry for your loss" can sound thin when the loss is an animal, because people fear it will not be taken seriously. These messages say it sincerely and warmly.

quotes.text: I am so sorry for the loss of your pet. They really were family.
So sorry. This is a real loss and I know how much they meant.
Sorry does not cover it, but I am, deeply.
I am sorry you have lost such a loyal friend.
So sorry for your loss. Please be gentle with yourself.
I am sorry. Grieve them as long as you need to.
So sorry to hear about your beloved companion.
I am sorry. They were lucky to have you and you know it.
Sorry for your loss, and grateful for the joy they brought you.
So very sorry. I am here if you want to talk about them.

categories.title: Pet Loss Messages for a Child
categories.h1: Gentle Pet Loss Messages for a Child
categories.metaTitle: Pet Loss Messages for a Child: 40+ Gentle Lines
categories.metaDescription: Gentle, age-appropriate pet loss messages to help a child grieve. Original wording to copy free or turn into a keepsake card.
categories.intro: A pet is often a child's first experience of grief. These messages are written to be honest and gentle at once, for a card or a quiet conversation.

quotes.text: It is okay to be very sad. It means you loved them very much.
They were so lucky to have you looking after them.
You gave them the happiest life a pet could have.
It is okay to cry, and it is okay to laugh at the funny things they did.
We can talk about them any time you want to.
Missing someone is just love with nowhere to go.
They knew you loved them. They always knew.
We will remember them together, for as long as you like.
You were their favourite person in the whole world.
Let us draw a picture of them and keep it somewhere special.

categories.blurb: Gentle words for a grieving child.
